name: Balaji Selvaraj
title: Technical AI Leader

heroQuote.translation: Let all your thoughts be lofty.
heroQuote.author: திருவள்ளுவர் • Thiruvalluvar
heroQuote.imageAlt: Statue of the Tamil poet-philosopher Thiruvalluvar

heroSubtitle: Helping global organizations transform advanced AI into production systems that deliver measurable business value.

intro: Hands-on Technical AI Lead with 12+ years spanning product, services, and startup environments.

strategicVision.title: Executive Sponsorship & Portfolio Strategy
strategicVision.description: Secured executive sponsorship and forged alignment around a shared strategic direction, transforming 5 exploratory initiatives into 2 funded, enterprise-scale programs.

strategicVision.title: Enterprise AI Capability Positioning
strategicVision.description: Established a newly formed AI team as a trusted enterprise partner across 7 internal business groups and 3 startups through differentiated AI capabilities aligned to strategic business needs.

strategicVision.title: Enterprise Portfolio Alignment
strategicVision.description: Delivered AI programs across Oncology, Biopharma R&D, and CPSS, aligning with AstraZeneca's 3 R&D priority areas over 3 consecutive years.

strategicVision.title: Authored the 2030 AI Vision
strategicVision.description: Authored a multimodal AI vision aligned with AstraZeneca's 2030 Gene & Cell Therapy strategy, later submitted to Gartner by GITC Chennai.

businessImpact.title: Projected Annual Savings ($20-50M)
businessImpact.description: Secured and delivered a $3M+ SVP-sponsored drug safety initiative, developing predictive AI toxicology models projected to save $20M-$50M annually.

businessImpact.title: Program Timeline Acceleration (5 to 3 Years)
businessImpact.description: Accelerated drug safety programs by 2 years, reducing study timelines from 5 years to 3 through predictive AI toxicology.

businessImpact.title: Portfolio Optimization
businessImpact.description: Optimized the AI investment portfolio, recovering approximately 6 months of delivery capacity while reducing infrastructure costs.

platform.title: Enterprise AI Platform
platform.description: Established and deployed a foundation-model platform that standardized training, inference, and evaluation across 3 clinical imaging modalities and 3 internal infrastructures.

platform.title: GxP-Compliant AI Platform
platform.description: Developed production AI pipelines within AstraZeneca's GxP-compliant platform, supporting validated, traceable, and audit-ready AI deployment.

platform.title: Distributed Foundation Model Training
platform.description: Implemented distributed training pipelines with FSDP and DeepSpeed, reducing training bottlenecks and enabling enterprise-scale foundation model development.

platform.title: Cost-Optimized Platform Design
platform.description: Designed a cost-efficient AI tooling strategy that reduced annual licensing costs by $40K while preserving enterprise capabilities.

peopleMentoring.title: Global Team Scaling
peopleMentoring.description: Built and led a multicultural AI engineering team spanning 5 countries, scaling from 1 to 12 engineers.

peopleMentoring.title: Talent Development
peopleMentoring.description: Guided 10 AI/ML graduate trainees in technical and professional development, with 8 transitioning to full-time industry roles and 2 pursuing higher education.

peopleMentoring.title: AI Capability Development
peopleMentoring.description: Developed and coached a team of 3 junior engineers to earn a Kaggle Bronze Medal, ranking 76th of 1,220 teams (Top 6%).

peopleMentoring.title: Emerging Talent Development
peopleMentoring.description: Guided a 4-student team to a Top 4 national finish at the Smart India Hackathon (2019).

responsibleGovernance.title: AI Regulatory Compliance
responsibleGovernance.description: Designed and delivered AI solutions aligned with EU AI Act requirements for high-risk clinical AI, embedding transparency, human oversight, audit logging, and governance controls into the solution architecture.

responsibleGovernance.title: Regulated Data Architecture
responsibleGovernance.description: Ensured AI pipelines processing patient and clinical data complied with GDPR and HIPAA by embedding privacy and regulatory controls into the data architecture.

responsibleGovernance.title: FAIR Data Governance
responsibleGovernance.description: Governed AI training data in line with FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable, Reusable) principles, enabling scientifically rigorous, interoperable, and reusable datasets across clinical studies and AI models.

items.name: Broad Institute
items.detail: Co-developing computational pipelines for Cell Painting and omics with Dr. Shantanu Singh (Senior Group Leader, Broad Institute)

items.name: Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory
items.detail: Neuron connectivity toolbox delivered to Dr. Partha Mitra

items.name: IIT Madras
items.detail: Research collaboration co-developing advanced AI models and computational pipelines

items.name: Uppsala University
items.detail: Research collaboration on AI models and computational pipelines

items.name: AI Sweden
items.detail: Master's thesis pipeline and Digital Twins initiative for drug discovery
